channel.title: shanbai09 TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from shanbai09

item.title: 竹筷 Bamboo Chopsticks | Dating back over 3,000 years to the Shang Dynasty, bamboo chopsticks evolved from cooking tools. Valued for bamboo's accessibility and durability, they became a timeless symbol of Eastern dining culture, carrying profound cultural s
item.description: 竹筷 Bamboo Chopsticks | Dating back over 3,000 years to the Shang Dynasty, bamboo chopsticks evolved from cooking tools. Valued for bamboo's accessibility and durability, they became a timeless symbol of Eastern dining culture, carrying profound cultural s

item.title: 玉女桃花粉 Jade Lady Peach Blossom Powder｜Originating in the Tang Dynasty, Jade Lady Peach Blossom Powder is a time-honored Chinese beauty powder. Crafted with natural ingredients, it was favored by noble ladies for its skin-nourishing and brightening effects,
item.description: 玉女桃花粉 Jade Lady Peach Blossom Powder｜Originating in the Tang Dynasty, Jade Lady Peach Blossom Powder is a time-honored Chinese beauty powder. Crafted with natural ingredients, it was favored by noble ladies for its skin-nourishing and brightening effects,

item.title: Xia Bu 夏布｜China’s ancient hand-woven treasure. 中国古老的手工织布珍宝 #china #traditional #ancient #handmade #heritage
item.description: Xia Bu 夏布｜China’s ancient hand-woven treasure. 中国古老的手工织布珍宝 #china #traditional #ancient #handmade #heritage

item.title: 青黛 Indigo naturalis｜Born from traditional dyeing & medicine, it shines as a time-honored herbal craft. #china #indigo #herbal #craft #traditional
item.description: 青黛 Indigo naturalis｜Born from traditional dyeing & medicine, it shines as a time-honored herbal craft. #china #indigo #herbal #craft #traditional

item.title: 土家织锦 Tujia Brocade｜Ancient art on fabric, Tujia brocade shines with ethnic elegance. #brocade #elegance #handmade #china #ancient
item.description: 土家织锦 Tujia Brocade｜Ancient art on fabric, Tujia brocade shines with ethnic elegance. #brocade #elegance #handmade #china #ancient

item.title: 香粉 Fragrant powders｜Trace back to ancient civilizations—Egyptians, Greeks & Romans crafted them with natural essences, a timeless tribute to beauty & tradition. #fragrant #natura #traditional #handmade #ancient
item.description: 香粉 Fragrant powders｜Trace back to ancient civilizations—Egyptians, Greeks & Romans crafted them with natural essences, a timeless tribute to beauty & tradition. #fragrant #natura #traditional #handmade #ancient

item.title: 千层底布鞋 Thousand-layer sole cloth shoes｜For centuries, Chinese artisans have perfected the craft of qiancengdi (thousand-layer sole) cloth shoes. More than just footwear, they are a testament to patience, frugality, and maternal love. #china #shoes #artisan
item.description: 千层底布鞋 Thousand-layer sole cloth shoes｜For centuries, Chinese artisans have perfected the craft of qiancengdi (thousand-layer sole) cloth shoes. More than just footwear, they are a testament to patience, frugality, and maternal love. #china #shoes #artisan

item.title: 土布 Tubu | China's traditional hand-woven cotton cloth, traces its roots to the pre-Qin period.Developed with primitive weaving techniques, it flourished in dynasties like the Ming and Qing, valued for its durability and natural texture. It became a symbol
item.description: 土布 Tubu | China's traditional hand-woven cotton cloth, traces its roots to the pre-Qin period.Developed with primitive weaving techniques, it flourished in dynasties like the Ming and Qing, valued for its durability and natural texture. It became a symbol

item.title: 小院子的枫叶已经红了 今天一看，真眼前一亮 相机已经拍不出它的美了
item.description: 小院子的枫叶已经红了 今天一看，真眼前一亮 相机已经拍不出它的美了

item.title: 白棉纸 White tissue paper｜Originated in ancient China, with early production traced to the Han Dynasty.Crafted from plant fibers like mulberry bark, it spread along the Silk Road to Asia and Europe, evolving into a global staple for wrapping and art. #ancien
item.description: 白棉纸 White tissue paper｜Originated in ancient China, with early production traced to the Han Dynasty.Crafted from plant fibers like mulberry bark, it spread along the Silk Road to Asia and Europe, evolving into a global staple for wrapping and art. #ancien

item.title: 香云纱 Xiangyunsha｜With roots tracing back to the Ming Dynasty, Xiangyunsha is a living heritage of Chinese silk craftsmanship. Its name, meaning "cloud-patterned yarn", comes from the subtle luster it acquires after being sun-dried and mud-dyed along the Pe
item.description: 香云纱 Xiangyunsha｜With roots tracing back to the Ming Dynasty, Xiangyunsha is a living heritage of Chinese silk craftsmanship. Its name, meaning "cloud-patterned yarn", comes from the subtle luster it acquires after being sun-dried and mud-dyed along the Pe

item.title: 葛根粉 Kudzu powder｜Recorded in ancient medical texts like Shennong Ben Cao Jing and Shang Han Lun, kudzu root was valued for its medicinal properties, while its powder gained popularity as a nourishing food. It became a royal tribute during the Tang and Son
item.description: 葛根粉 Kudzu powder｜Recorded in ancient medical texts like Shennong Ben Cao Jing and Shang Han Lun, kudzu root was valued for its medicinal properties, while its powder gained popularity as a nourishing food. It became a royal tribute during the Tang and Son

item.title: 花露胭脂 Flower dew rouge | An iconic traditional Chinese cosmetic, traces its origins to ancient times. Its name derives from its key ingredients: delicate floral essences and plant-based pigments. Historical records suggest that as early as the Han Dynasty,
item.description: 花露胭脂 Flower dew rouge | An iconic traditional Chinese cosmetic, traces its origins to ancient times. Its name derives from its key ingredients: delicate floral essences and plant-based pigments. Historical records suggest that as early as the Han Dynasty,

item.title: 古琴 Guqin | First noted in The Book of Songs, it was a scholar's self-cultivation tool in the pre-Qin period, topping the Han Dynasty's "Four Arts" . Tang poet Wang Wei described its charm in verses; the Song Qin Shi recorded its players and tunes. It's th
item.description: 古琴 Guqin | First noted in The Book of Songs, it was a scholar's self-cultivation tool in the pre-Qin period, topping the Han Dynasty's "Four Arts" . Tang poet Wang Wei described its charm in verses; the Song Qin Shi recorded its players and tunes. It's th

item.title: 箍木盆 Hooped wooden Basin | Dating to Neolithic Yangshao Culture, it once held grains; later, bronze basins served as ritual wares in Shang-Zhou dynasties. Tang-Song folks used it for soup or flower arrangement-even Dreams of Splendor noted its role in stre
item.description: 箍木盆 Hooped wooden Basin | Dating to Neolithic Yangshao Culture, it once held grains; later, bronze basins served as ritual wares in Shang-Zhou dynasties. Tang-Song folks used it for soup or flower arrangement-even Dreams of Splendor noted its role in stre

item.title: 茶枯皂 Tea Seed Cake Soap | Its origins trace back to Shennong Ben Cao Jing (Han Dynasty), which documented the medicinal value of tea seeds. Ancient people discovered that the residue (tea seed cake) left after pressing tea seeds for oil had both cleansing
item.description: 茶枯皂 Tea Seed Cake Soap | Its origins trace back to Shennong Ben Cao Jing (Han Dynasty), which documented the medicinal value of tea seeds. Ancient people discovered that the residue (tea seed cake) left after pressing tea seeds for oil had both cleansing

item.title: 白云深处有一家小院子 六七个人👬十一只狗🐶外加一只小猫咪🐱 There is a small courtyard deep in the clouds, where six or seven people, 👬eleven dogs 🐶and a little cat live together.🐱
item.description: 白云深处有一家小院子 六七个人👬十一只狗🐶外加一只小猫咪🐱 There is a small courtyard deep in the clouds, where six or seven people, 👬eleven dogs 🐶and a little cat live together.🐱

item.title: 朱砂口脂 Vermilion Lip Balm | Its story starts with “Zhou Li”(Western Zhou Dynasty), which first recorded "vermilion paste" as a facial adornment for court ladies. Ancient people ground cinnabar (vermilion) with beeswax and sesame oil — this mixture not only
item.description: 朱砂口脂 Vermilion Lip Balm | Its story starts with “Zhou Li”(Western Zhou Dynasty), which first recorded "vermilion paste" as a facial adornment for court ladies. Ancient people ground cinnabar (vermilion) with beeswax and sesame oil — this mixture not only

item.title: 连史纸 Rice Paper (Lianshi paper| Its origins trace back to the Song Dynasty, which marked the initial rise of this fine paper. The Ming Dynasty's Tiangong Kaiwu (ancient Chinese encyclopedia of technology) documented its production method: made from tender
item.description: 连史纸 Rice Paper (Lianshi paper| Its origins trace back to the Song Dynasty, which marked the initial rise of this fine paper. The Ming Dynasty's Tiangong Kaiwu (ancient Chinese encyclopedia of technology) documented its production method: made from tender

item.title: 茶盘 Tea Tray I Its origins trace back to The Classic of Tea (Tang Dynasty), which documented the matching rules for tea utensils. Ancient people discovered that wooden utensils were ideal for holding water and displaying tea, gradually polishing them into
item.description: 茶盘 Tea Tray I Its origins trace back to The Classic of Tea (Tang Dynasty), which documented the matching rules for tea utensils. Ancient people discovered that wooden utensils were ideal for holding water and displaying tea, gradually polishing them into

item.title: 虎妞生了四个女孩，四个男孩。 Hu Niu gave birth to four daughters and four sons.
item.description: 虎妞生了四个女孩，四个男孩。 Hu Niu gave birth to four daughters and four sons.

item.title: 火草布 Fireweed Cloth | Its origins trace back to the ancient life of southwestern Chinese ethnic groups (e.g., Yi, Bai), where people discovered that fibers from wild fireweed leaves could be spun into thread after retting and hammering. By the Ming Dynasty
item.description: 火草布 Fireweed Cloth | Its origins trace back to the ancient life of southwestern Chinese ethnic groups (e.g., Yi, Bai), where people discovered that fibers from wild fireweed leaves could be spun into thread after retting and hammering. By the Ming Dynasty

item.title: “十方莲华，奉行香音”一唐代紫檀木画槽琵琶制作A pipa (Chinese lute) made of rosewood with painted decorations, from the Tang Dynasty. #ancient #handmade #pipa #china#craft
item.description: “十方莲华，奉行香音”一唐代紫檀木画槽琵琶制作A pipa (Chinese lute) made of rosewood with painted decorations, from the Tang Dynasty. #ancient #handmade #pipa #china#craft

item.title: 入窑一色出窑万彩 Jun porcelain: one color goes into the kiln, a myriad of colors come out. #handmade #ancient #china #porcelain #craft
item.description: 入窑一色出窑万彩 Jun porcelain: one color goes into the kiln, a myriad of colors come out. #handmade #ancient #china #porcelain #craft

item.title: 在拥挤的赛道里 坚守住我们有且擅长的东西 In a crowded field, we hold fast to what is uniquely ours and what we do best.
item.description: 在拥挤的赛道里 坚守住我们有且擅长的东西 In a crowded field, we hold fast to what is uniquely ours and what we do best.

item.title: 只要有光，可以照到别人 同样也可以照到自己 Where there is light, it can shine on others and also shine on yourself.
item.description: 只要有光，可以照到别人 同样也可以照到自己 Where there is light, it can shine on others and also shine on yourself.

item.title: 东巴纸是纳西族东巴祭司抄写东巴经、绘制东巴画的专用手工纸，创制于唐代，距今已有1200多年历史，它被誉为“人类手工造纸活化石”，东巴纸的神奇之处在于原料采用有毒的丽江荛花，使得东巴纸抗虫、抗蛀，能保存干年，真正实现“纸寿干年”；东巴纸的质地厚实耐磨，呈象牙色，久用会变为古铜色，是中国传统手工纸中极少数可以双面书写的纸张。 Dongba paper is a specialized handmade paper used by the Dongba priests of the Naxi people f
item.description: 东巴纸是纳西族东巴祭司抄写东巴经、绘制东巴画的专用手工纸，创制于唐代，距今已有1200多年历史，它被誉为“人类手工造纸活化石”，东巴纸的神奇之处在于原料采用有毒的丽江荛花，使得东巴纸抗虫、抗蛀，能保存干年，真正实现“纸寿干年”；东巴纸的质地厚实耐磨，呈象牙色，久用会变为古铜色，是中国传统手工纸中极少数可以双面书写的纸张。 Dongba paper is a specialized handmade paper used by the Dongba priests of the Naxi people f

item.title: He Kiln｜金丝铁线 龙泉哥窑#china #handmade #prodaction
item.description: He Kiln｜金丝铁线 龙泉哥窑#china #handmade #prodaction

item.title: 龙泉青瓷 Longquan Celadon | Originated in the Five Dynasties, flourished in the Song Dynasty, crafted in Longquan (Zhejiang) with its iconic celadon glaze, a treasure of Chinese porcelain. #traditional #handmade #chinesecraft #chineseheritage #countrysidelife
item.description: 龙泉青瓷 Longquan Celadon | Originated in the Five Dynasties, flourished in the Song Dynasty, crafted in Longquan (Zhejiang) with its iconic celadon glaze, a treasure of Chinese porcelain. #traditional #handmade #chinesecraft #chineseheritage #countrysidelife
